titleStmt.title: SII 39.110: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 110. (A.R. No. 110 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH TIER OF THE SAME TEMPLE. MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULAŚĒKHARADĒVA, ‘WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL THE COUNTRIES’-2[2]ND YEAR (1288 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of the village Tiruvāṉḍiyēri as Tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple of Iḷaiyapiḷḷaiyār by the temple servants, Kappalūr-uḍaiyāṉ figures as one of the signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī makkittikku mel śrī komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tirahuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 22vatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrva
pakṣattu Ēkateciyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ puramalaināṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar te
varkaṉmi śrī māheśvarak kaṅkāṇi cikāriyam ceyvār koyiṟ kaṇakkarom Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumalaimel Iḷaiyapiḷḷaiyārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta
paricāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi tiruvāṇṭiyeri perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum naṉcey puṉceyyum nattamuṉ toṭṭamu kuḷapparippum meṉokkiya maramum kīḻṇo
kkiyakkiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uḷpaṭa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷukku Ippiḷḷaiyārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Iḷaiya piḷḷaiyārkku
Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmi śrī māheśvarakkaṅkāṇi cikāriyam ceyvār koyiṟ kaṇakkarom Ippaṭi viṟṟa Ittiruvāṇṭiyeri cantirātittavar Iḷaiyapiḷḷaiyārkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy Amu
tupaṭikkum tiruppaṇikkum Immutal celavaḻivutāka Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇi kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar tevarkaṉmi śrī māheśvarakka
ṅkāṇi śrī kāriyañ ceyvār koyiṟ kaṇakkarom Ippaṭikku tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tirunelvēli Uṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku kulacekarappaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ālāla cuntarapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Īśvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku malaimel maruntiṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku periyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tillaimuvaryirappaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tevarkaṉmi cantiracekarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
cimāheśvarak kaṅkāṇi Uyyaneṟi kāṭṭiṉāṉeḻuttu cikāriyam kappalūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku koyiṟkkaṇakku veḷār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
